name: UniDoor BAL29
subtitle: Pre-hung insulated steel doorset designed for Australian bushfire-prone construction.
shortDescription: UniDoor BAL29 is a pre-hung insulated steel doorset engineered for external applications in Australian bushfire-prone areas. Designed with a non-combustible metal clad door leaf and rockwool insulation, it provides compliance pathways for BAL 12.5, BAL 19 and BAL 29 construction requirements.
longDescription: Designed and engineered for Australian bushfire-prone construction, UniDoor BAL29 combines a non-combustible steel-faced door leaf, rockwool insulated core and integrated pre-hung steel frame system. Suitable for insulated panel buildings, modular construction and steel framing systems, the doorset delivers reliable performance, simplified installation and enhanced fire resistance while meeting the construction requirements of AS 3959:2018.

features.explain: Designed for BAL-rated applications and suitable for projects requiring compliance pathways for BAL 12.5, BAL 19 and BAL 29 construction requirements.
Steel-faced rockwool insulated construction designed to support improved fire performance pathways in bushfire-prone areas.
Integrated steel frame system supplied pre-hung for faster installation and simplified onsite coordination.
Tested to relevant Australian wind loading requirements for demanding environments, including modular and transportable building applications.
Suitable for insulated panel buildings, modular construction and steel framing systems.
Rockwool insulated core assists thermal performance and improves acoustic comfort.

whyChoose: UniDoor BAL29 is specifically engineered for Australian bushfire-prone construction. Combining a non-combustible steel-faced door leaf, rockwool insulated core, BAL-rated sealing system and pre-hung installation design, it provides builders with a practical solution for projects requiring bushfire compliance pathways while maintaining durability, thermal performance and ease of installation.

seo.title: UniDoor BAL29 | Steel Bushfire Doorset for Bushfire-Prone Construction
seo.description: Pre-hung insulated steel doorset designed for Australian bushfire-prone construction. Suitable for BAL 12.5, BAL 19 and BAL 29 applications.
